nasb.text: being stationed until now at the king’s gate to the east). These were the gatekeepers for the camp of the sons of Levi.

esv.text: until then they were in the king’s gate on the east side as the gatekeepers of the camps of the Levites.

cnv.text: 直到現在，他們仍是看守東面的王門；他們曾經作過利未營的守門人。

ccb.text: 在朝东的王门任职；他们曾是利未营中的守门人。
